sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25815" key="diasi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διασίζω</orth>, <sense id="n25815.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hiss</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whistle violently,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0673.tlg001:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.Socr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
